text: Hello friends, my name is Dr. Vishal Soni and I would be demonstrating a small step of robotic groin hernia repair, the TAP plus technique.
The surgeon closes the direct hernia defect using various sutures as part of the TAP plus technique.
The surgeon uses a 2-0 V-Loc barbed absorbable suture to close the hernia defect.
The surgeon begins suturing in a continuous fashion from the lower region near the pubic arch, progressing upwards without interlocking the sutures.
The surgeon carefully places additional running sutures in the area, ensuring they sit snugly without injuring the surrounding vital structures.
